claim_boundary: This is negative prefix evidence only; it does not satisfy G005 or any full-corpus paper-target win.
diagnosis: Auxiliary button-event denoising head trained and calibrated, but its calibration probabilities are saturated: thresholds <=0.45 predict every row, thresholds >=0.50 predict none.
Bounded-FPR calibration therefore selected threshold 0.50 with zero recall, keeping no-button FPR at 0.0 but failing mouse-button accuracy/F1.
Keyboard regressed to 0.01222, so the next branch should improve calibration granularity/probability ranking before more scaling.
next_action: Add probability-quantile/dynamic threshold candidates for sparse button event/token calibration and rerun a bounded prefix probe; do not checkpoint G005.
